title: I Can't Just Leave You
overview: Mitsuyoshi encounters a foreign girl who lost her companion while taking photographs. Through many odd series of events they leave and are continuously reunited together.

title: Well, She's Not Wrong
overview: After touring all the clubs at school, Teresa decides to join the photography club. The intensity begins as the club initiates a photography battle!

title: You Love That
overview: As Nyanko Big is reluctant to help open the shop, Teresa and Alec offer a hand in effort to gain additional experience!

title: I'll Pretend I Didn't See This
overview: After Hajime becomes the lucky winner of the HINA's Book Launch Meet and Greet, the photography club helps him overcome his fear.

title: It's Okay. They Don't Exist.
overview: Ijuin-kun treats everyone to his cooking for the Tenth Annual Kaoru Ijuin show. Later Teresa enjoys her first bathhouse experience.

title: I'm Not a Rain-bringer
overview: An unexpected visitor from Teresa's childhood appears in Japan. He is introduced to the photography club and later invites Teresa to a party.

title: It's Better Than Crying
overview: When Nyanko-big doesn't return home, the gang splits up and does everything they can to make sure he returns home safely.

title: Did You Say You Were a Rain-bringer?
overview: The photography club goes on an adventure as they take the rental SLR cameras to capture photos of the stars for the September contest.

title: I Don't Have One Now...
overview: Teresa is acting strange in front of everyone as she secretly makes a very serious decision before returning back to Larsenburg.

title: It Isn't the Real One
overview: Teresa fulfills her lifelong dream of watching Rainbow Showgun live with Tada by her side.

title: Not Really
overview: Questions arise as Teresa and Alec go unexpectedly missing. Mitsuyoshi reminisces about all the times he has spent with her.

title: Sorry for Surprising You...
overview: Tada faces his fears and gets on a plane to Larsenburg in hopes of seeing Teresa again. However, he finds himself in the middle of an awkward situation.

title: I'll Never Forget It, Either.
overview: Emotions run wild as Teresa and Charles get closer to tying the knot. Tada races to recover his invitation to the ceremony. Will Tada ever be able to settle his feelings?
